sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37609" key="e)cormisto/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξορμ-ιστόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a <sense id="n37609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish</tr_> similar to the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μύραινα,</foreign> Cassiod.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Var.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.4</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
